title: Hexa Match
description: Match and connect colorful hexagon blocks to clear the board! A fun and addictive puzzle game that challenges your brain.
instructions: Drag and place the hexagon blocks on the grid to make complete lines and clear them.
tips: Try to plan your moves ahead—leaving space for bigger hexagons is the key to survival.

title: Number Master Run
description: Run through challenging tracks, collect numbers, and multiply your score to become the ultimate Number Master!
instructions: Swipe or use arrow keys to move your character, collect numbers, and avoid obstacles.
tips: Choose the higher multipliers to maximize your score and finish with the strongest number.

title: Math Crossword
description: Sharpen your brain with Math Crossword! Solve equations and fill the crossword grid with the correct numbers.
instructions: Click on the empty boxes and type the correct number that solves the equation.
tips: Focus on easy equations first to unlock hints for the harder ones.

title: Code Runner: Binary Change
description: Solve binary-based puzzles and manipulate bits to complete levels in Code Runner: Binary Change. Perfect for sharpening logical and coding skills.
instructions: Use mouse or touch to select and flip bits, complete the target binary patterns, and advance to the next level.
tips: Work from left to right and keep track of bit carries — small steps make complex patterns easier.

title: Monster Worm
description: Control a giant hungry worm and feed on soldiers, destroy airplanes, and cause chaos! Upgrade and level up your monster worm for even more destruction.
instructions: Use arrow keys to move and guide your worm through the battlefield. Eat enemies and avoid heavy fire.
tips: Upgrade speed and size early to maximize destruction. Keep moving to avoid being trapped by enemies.
